name: Sunset Beach
tagline: The crown jewel of the Seven Mile Miracle — where the world's best surfers come to prove themselves every winter.
parking: Street parking along Kamehameha Hwy fills fast in winter; arrive before 9 AM
bestTime: Summer for swimming and sunsets; winter (Nov–Feb) for watching world-class surf competitions
talkStory: Sunset Beach is the crown jewel of the 'Seven Mile Miracle,' the stretch of North Shore coastline that hosts the world's most prestigious surf competitions. The Vans Triple Crown of Surfing runs here November through December, and watching from the sand is free — you are closer to world-class athletes than at any other major sport. In summer, the same beach that produces 30-foot winter faces goes completely flat, revealing a wide sandy beach perfect for families. Grab a plate lunch from a Kam Highway food truck, park on the sand, and watch the sun drop into the Pacific.
